description: Private account of Yosef b. Eli Kohen al-Fasi. Dating: around 1057 (Gil). Contains details about partnership between the writer and Barhūn b. Ṣāliḥ regarding purchasing flax in Busir, and details about silk trade. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #397) VMR
description_he: רשימה או טבלה. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
